fields.label: Source DocType
fields.description: The DocType containing the translatable content

fields.label: Source Document
fields.description: The specific document containing the translatable content

fields.label: Language
fields.description: Target language for translation

fields.label: Field Name
fields.description: Name of the field being translated

fields.label: Is Translated
fields.description: Whether this field has been translated

fields.label: Translation Status
fields.options:
Pending
In Progress
Translated
Needs Review
Approved
Rejected
fields.description: Current status of the translation

fields.label: Translation Score
fields.description: Quality/completeness score for this translation (0-100%)

fields.label: Translation Method
fields.options:
Manual
Machine Translation
AI Assisted
Memory Match
Imported
fields.description: How the translation was created

fields.label: Source Value
fields.description: Original content in the source language

fields.label: Translated Value
fields.description: Translated content in the target language

fields.label: Source Hash
fields.description: Hash of source value to detect changes

fields.label: Needs Update
fields.description: Set when source content has changed since last translation

fields.label: Source Modified
fields.description: When the source content was last modified

fields.label: Translation Modified
fields.description: When the translation was last modified

fields.label: Translated By
fields.description: User who created/updated the translation

fields.label: Reviewed By
fields.description: User who reviewed the translation

fields.label: Review Date
fields.description: When the translation was reviewed

fields.label: Review Notes
fields.description: Notes from the reviewer

fields.label: Frappe Translation Name
fields.description: Reference to Frappe's built-in Translation entry

fields.label: Use Frappe Translation
fields.description: Whether to sync with Frappe's built-in Translation system

fields.label: Last Synced
fields.description: When this status was last synced with Frappe Translation
